channel.title: Food on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Food on Have an average day :|

item.title: In Soviet Russia chocolate coins eat you!
item.description: So it’s my birthday lunch at work today and I get some chocolate coins left over from the Chinese new year. On the left, Soviets. On the right, Liberty.

item.title: Breakfast Fun: Baked Eggs in Avocados | Family Kitchen
item.description: via Breakfast Fun: Baked Eggs in Avocados | Family Kitchen. Baked Eggs in Avocados Cut an avocado in half and remove the pit. Slice the avocado in 1⁄2-inch thick slices and use a round cookie cutter or knife to cut an even circle in the center. Rub a skillet with a light coating of oil and place the avocado slices on top. Crack an egg in the center of each avocado.

item.title: MMM Dick Cake.
item.description: So it was a certain unnamed friends birthday over the weekend. I sadly was unable to attend. However my friends made sure that the event was well celebrated with a dick cake. I had to blur her out because apparently eating a dick cake on your own time can get you fired or something. It’s all in good fun though.

item.title: Jamie Oliver's Food Revolution: 70% of America's Beef is Treated with Ammonia - YouTube
item.description: Even though Jamie Oliver comes off of as a bit of a whiner he makes great points. Jamie Oliver’s Food Revolution: 70% of America’s Beef is Treated with Ammonia – YouTube.

item.title: how to eat a chicken wing with one hand. - YouTube
item.description: Holy crap. I want wings now. I’ve seen various ways of eating chicken wings but this is the best I’ve seen so far. I really need a a simple way of making them too. how to eat a chicken wing with one hand. – YouTube.
